persons.arguments_against: Tenure overlap failed on mechanics. But initials J.W. = 'John Wm', colony Tasmania, birth 1850 (age 38 in 1888), and the audit-office progression (Chief Clerk -> Deputy Auditor -> Auditor-General of Tasmania) matches the entry exactly. The same person.
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person in the same colony and years holding the same office, or a printed death/birth date excluding these years.
